items.reasoning: Sustain through Arc Lightning + Split Earth magic harass combo.
Vision on Zeus positioning for Arc Lightning harass angles.
Emergency heal when Leshrac Lightning Storm + Zeus combo chunks HP.
Burst mana for Fortune's End purge when carry is caught by Split Earth.
Dodge Split Earth 0.35s delay. Oracle needs positioning for Fate's Edict range.
Zeus + Leshrac spam 8+ spells per minute. Wand charges save lives.
Block 120 magic damage per proc. 5 charges absorb ~600 magic damage for 225g.
45% magic resistance on ally during Zeus + Leshrac burst. Thundergod's Wrath damage halved.
Push carry out of Leshrac Pulse Nova AoE. Reposition Oracle for False Promise range.
Survives Zeus Nimbus + Thundergod's Wrath global combo. Ensures False Promise cast.
35% healing amplification on False Promise healing. Turns ult into full HP recovery.
False Promise on 2 targets simultaneously. Oracle becomes the ultimate anti-burst hero.
If no one else builds it, Oracle Pipe + Fate's Edict = 80%+ magic reduction.
Ethereal form + Fate's Edict = complete damage immunity for 4 seconds.

recommendation.overall_strategy: Oracle's Fate's Edict grants 100% magic damage immunity for 3.5s -- the hardest counter to Zeus and Leshrac. False Promise delays all damage for 7 seconds while healing doubles. Stack magic resistance with Glimmer Cape and position to cast Fate's Edict before Thundergod's Wrath global.
